A [[Color/Legends|green]]-skinned '''individual''' was the leader of the swamp [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] gang on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Trigalis/Legends|Trigalis]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He and his gangsters tried to steal [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], but the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mission to Trigalis|defeated]] them.
